response.overview: Joonatan brings his wife Ida and their newborn home, but her postpartum depression casts a shadow over their lives. Pressured by his friend Vana, he joins a nighttime burglary, bringing the baby along. Inside a house they believed to be empty, they encounter a young boy who mistakes Joonatan for his father. When the truth is revealed, Vana shoots the boy. Shocked, Joonatan must choose—and decides to abandon the loot to save his child.
response.title: Lilleke Rohus
